description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build and Deploy to npm that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two jobs: precompile and publish-npm-package. The precompile job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-22.04, windows-latest, macos-13, and macos-15, and for each platform, it checks out the code, sets up Node.js 18.12.1, installs dependencies, builds nodegui, compresses files, and uploads the archive as a GitHub Actions artifact. The publish-npm-package job depends on precompile, runs on ubuntu-latest, and publishes the npm package using NPM_TOKEN from secrets.
